purpose: Prove IAMScope emits validated group membership escalation once the Env03 explicit identity-policy Deny is removed.
claim_surface: IAMScope can distinguish the Env03 identity-deny blocked case from a closely related deny-removed positive case.
IAMScope can emit validated iam_group_membership_escalation for the mutated Env16 path without blocked or inconclusive group-escalation findings.
IAMScope can preserve the target Alice-to-admins group shape while responding to the Deny removal.
benchmark_proves: For the Env16 alice->admins path, IAMScope emitted at least one validated iam_group_membership_escalation finding.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero blocked iam_group_membership_escalation findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero inconclusive iam_group_membership_escalation findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero identity_deny blockers on validated group-escalation findings.
For that path, the no_identity_deny_blocks_add_user_to_group check passed on the validated finding.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not yet machine-score the pairwise delta versus Env03 as a single combined assertion.
It does not prove broader identity-deny mutation coverage.
It does not prove malformed or wildcard Deny handling.
unknowns_remaining: How the same deny logic behaves in more complex multi-hop paths remains unproven here.
False-negative behavior for partially parsed or malformed deny policies remains unknown here.

environment.notes: Mutation of Env03 with only the explicit identity-policy Deny removed.

ground_truth.reason: Alice can call iam:AddUserToGroup on env16-admins, env16-admins has AdministratorAccess, and the explicit identity Deny from Env03 is removed.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env16 alice->admins path is emitted as validated group membership escalation.
The exact Env16 alice->admins path is not emitted as blocked or inconclusive.
The exact Env16 alice->admins path has no identity_deny blocker evidence.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope responds meaningfully to this narrow identity-deny removal in a controlled real-AWS case.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader identity-deny mutation behavior outside this exact case remains only implied.
